title: Brachyscome carnosa
taxonomy: Brachyscome carnosa is classified as a species within the genus Brachyscome, which is a group of flowering plants in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This genus is further categorized under the tribe Gnaphalieae, which comprises small-flowered plants. The family Asteraceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants that includes daisies, sunflowers, and many other species. Brachyscome carnosa is native to Australia and is commonly known as the 'cushion daisy'. The plant is often used as an ornamental in gardens and landscaping due to its delicate appearance and ability to thrive in a variety of conditions.
